title: Analytical Sensitivity of the BOSCH Vivalytic Molecular Assay for Detection of Monkeypox Virus Clade Ib
author_string: Escadafal, C., Adea, K., Mbala, P., Eckerle, I.
abstract: We evaluated the BOSCH Vivalytic MPXV assay using serial dilutions of monkeypox virus clade Ib, a new offshoot of clade I identified in 2023. The assay detected viral DNA down to [~]100 copies/mL demonstrating comparable analytical sensitivity to our in-house reference PCR and to other commercial platform-based mpox molecular assays.
author_corresponding_institution: Faculty of Medicine, University of Geneva
